jackie-o-cocktail-the.name: Jackie-o Cocktail: The
instructions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, combine the crème de cassis, cognac, and lemon juice. Shake for 20 seconds, then strain into a coupe glass.
Top with sparkling wine and garnish with an orange peel.

juicy-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-red-f.name: Juicy Grilled Chicken Breasts With Red Fruit Sauce
juicy-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-red-f.original_name: Jugosas pechugas de pollo a la plancha con salsa de frutos rojos

ingredients.item: 2  filetes de pechuga de pollo (150-180 g cada uno)
1 cda de aceite de oliva ( extra virgen)
1 / 2 cup of fresh or frozen cranberries
1/2 taza de frambuesas frescas o congeladas
1 cda de miel pura o sirope de agave
1 / 2 cdite of Orange Grilling (optional, for more depth of flavour)

instructions: In a small frying pan, add the red fruits with water, honey, balsamic vinegar, lemon juice, salt and orange frying. Cooking with medium low heat for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, till fruit gets rid and mixture gets light compot consistency. You can shredder slightly with a fork or leave it more rustic. Reserve hot.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, salt, pepper, rosemary and garlic powder. Unite this mixture onto both sides of the breasts and let them rest at room temperature for 10 minutes.

Warm an anti-stick frying pan or grill with medium-high heat. When well hot, put the breasts and cook them for 4 to 5 minutes by the side, without moving them too much, till they are golden and juicy from inside. Check that there are no raw parts to the centre.
Serves hot breasts and baits with still tibia red fruit sauce. Can be accompanied with mashed potatoes, attic salad or lemon cous.
